---
name: Maintainer Application
about: If you want to be an official Cadence maintainer, please use this template.
title: "[Maintainer Application] <github-alias>"
labels: ''
assignees: demirkayaender

---

- [ ] Introduce yourself!
- [ ] Confirm that you read our Governance document and the Maintainer section
- [ ] List of repos with your contributions in the following format:
  - https://github.com/cadence-workflow/<repo>/commits/master/?author=<github-alias>
  - Example: https://github.com/cadence-workflow/cadence/commits/master/?author=demirkayaender
- [ ] Explain which company you work for (if applies), and how you use Cadence
- [ ] Confirm your commitment about consistent future contributions. Mention how frequently you plan to contribute and which areas you are interested in.
